regions.rationale: Keycloak sign-in card; tightens the small form on a mostly-empty page.
Top-of-page pill is small; tightens to give the click presence on an otherwise empty agents page.

Paste → Test → Save in one row. Holds across token-input, test, save (clicks 5, 7, 8). Centre is anchored on those click bboxes (mean of paste + save row). first_t_ms=21300 starts the ramp-in (f_pre=20700) just past R2's f_post=20690 — abuts cleanly with no overlap, so the wide gap between the pill-1 zoom and this card zoom is ~10ms instead of 9s. Centre still on the paste/test/save row. Page navigation (t=19947) sits inside R2's tail and the brief gap, where wide is appropriate. Click 4 (svg, stray) at t=23933 is inside this region's hold; harmless.
Slight tighten on the template list inside the modal; modal already sits on a dimmed background so a heavier zoom would feel claustrophobic.

Configure step: Name + Connections + Network access + Create. Holds while the user toggles (clicks 13-16 are the connection-checkbox stray-cluster) and lands on Create (click 17). Mean of clicks ≈ (920, 580) which sits near the form centre.
Prompt typing + send. {{send}} cue was unbound (Enter-to-submit, no click), so anchor only on prompt-input click and dwell 4s to cover the typing/send window before the wait beat goes wide.

Right-panel beat. {{app-js}} cue was unbound — user opened index.html (click 21) instead. Region holds through index.html → LOG → CONFIG (clicks 21, 22, 23). rect_css explicitly frames the top-half of the narrow right panel; the click bboxes alone would centre near the tabs and let too much of the chat area into frame.
